property.name: java.library.path

testcase.name: contextLoads

While this cache implementation is useful for development and tests, it's recommended to use Caffeine cache in production.You can switch to using Caffeine cache, by adding it and org.springframework.cache.caffeine.CaffeineCacheManager to the classpath. 2026-05-08T23:05:17.840+01:00 INFO 51668 --- [ main] c.m.order.OrderServiceApplicationTests : Started OrderServiceApplicationTests in 13.627 seconds (process running for 95.79)
